title: The S-Crested Bag of Holding
bodyText: Taken from the goblins (S07). Interior: a void far larger than it should be, currently organized by **Cumb** (resident). Stitched crest with a capital **S** — matching the marks cut into the two corpses found inside. Contents of record: the corpses (human f / dwarf m, leather + dark cloaks), size-sorted stones, travel gear. See [[thread-mr-spells]].
